headline: Capital One’s New AI-Focused Leadership Team Might Change The Case For Investing In Capital One Financial (COF)
summary: Earlier this week, Capital One Financial announced a reshaped executive team, appointing Judah Korman as COO, Zack Wilder as CTO, and Mordy Beyman as Executive Vice President, to accelerate its push into advanced technology and artificial intelligence across its financial services platform. This leadership overhaul signals that Capital One aims to compete less as a traditional lender and more as a technology-focused financial services platform, with AI positioned at the core of future...
